seed_problem: Pack polyominoes into a WxH board maximizing covered area (Frontier-CS problems 0,1; AlphaEvolve)
mutation: composite: (goal) maximize monitored HAZARD WEIGHT instead of uniform covered area, over a skewed per-cell weight map; (input/output) bounded per-type supply that is far below the board area so supply is binding and WHERE you place decides the score; rotation+reflection allowed, awkward footprints so exact tiling is impossible
title: Volcano Flank: Weighted Seismic Sensor Packing
strategies: regular bounding-box grid tiling of a single array type on arbitrary cells (baseline)
first-fit-by-area greedy: fill empty cells row-major with the largest array that fits (ignores weights)
weight-density best-first greedy: repeatedly deploy the array/orientation/anchor that adds the most hazard weight, until supply/packing is exhausted
randomized multi-restart local search over weighted-greedy orders, keep the best monitored weight; ILP relaxation under per-type availability
